title: crataegus monogyna var. lagenaria
intro: Crataegus monogyna var. lagenaria, also known as hawthorn berry, is a variety of the hawthorn plant that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It is a thorny shrub or small tree with medicinal properties, particularly in its berries, which contain flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Crataegus monogyna var. lagenaria include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to various health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing the risk of heart disease. Crataegus monogyna var. lagenaria can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in herbal medicine to support cardiovascular health and overall well-being.
